mission.title: Install and Configure Opentofu on Kubernetes
mission.description: OpenTofu is an open-source tool that allows you to declaratively manage your cloud infrastructure safely and efficiently. By installing OpenTofu, you can leverage its capabilities to build, change, and version your infrastructure as code.

steps.title: Install OpenTofu CLI
steps.description:
Install OpenTofu using the official install script:
```bash
# Linux / macOS
curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -fsSL https://get.opentofu.org/install-opentofu.sh -o install-opentofu.sh
chmod +x install-opentofu.sh
./install-opentofu.sh --install-method standalone
rm install-opentofu.sh
```
Or via package manager:
```bash
# macOS
brew install opentofu

# Debian/Ubuntu
curl -fsSL https://packagecloud.io/install/repositories/opentofu/tofu/script.deb.sh | sudo bash
sudo apt-get install tofu
```

steps.title: Initialize a project
Apply the configuration
steps.description:
```bash
tofu plan
tofu apply -auto-approve
cat hello.txt
```

resolution.summary: OpenTofu is installed as a CLI tool for infrastructure-as-code provisioning, compatible with Terraform configurations.

uninstall.title: Remove OpenTofu
uninstall.description:
```bash
# If installed via script
sudo rm /usr/local/bin/tofu

# If installed via Homebrew
brew uninstall opentofu

# If installed via apt
sudo apt-get remove tofu
```

upgrade.title: Upgrade OpenTofu
upgrade.description:
```bash
# Homebrew
brew upgrade opentofu

# Or re-run the install script
curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -fsSL https://get.opentofu.org/install-opentofu.sh | sh -s -- --install-method standalone
```

troubleshooting.title: Provider initialization fails
troubleshooting.description:
Clear the provider cache and re-initialize:
```bash
rm -rf .terraform
tofu init
```

troubleshooting.title: State file conflicts
troubleshooting.description:
Use remote state backends for team collaboration:
```hcl
backend "s3" {
  bucket = "my-state-bucket"
  key    = "state.tfstate"
}
```

troubleshooting.title: Migrating from Terraform
troubleshooting.description:
OpenTofu is a drop-in replacement. Rename `terraform` blocks to work with `tofu`:
```bash
tofu init -upgrade
```

prerequisites.description: No Kubernetes cluster required. OpenTofu is a standalone CLI tool for infrastructure provisioning.
